title: agrostis stolonifera var. laevigata
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. laevigata, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass that is native to North America and parts of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. laevigata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can also be used topically in the form of creams or salves.
